title: Intraday Classified Alert
description: Normalized item after AI classification and scoring. Produced by module 05, consumed by modules 06–09.

item_id.description: Deterministic item identifier carried forward from the normalized item.

topic_slug.description: Primary topic assigned by AI classification.

secondary_topics.description: Up to two secondary topics identified by the AI model.

headline.description: Refined headline. May be lightly edited by the AI for clarity.

summary_text.description: AI-generated one- to two-sentence summary suitable for the timeline.

severity_score.description: How disruptive or urgent the event is (0–100). Set by the AI model.

importance_score.description: How broadly relevant the event is to the topic audience (0–100). Set by the AI model.

confidence_score.description: AI confidence in the classification and scores (0–100).

send_alert.description: True when the AI recommends sending an alert. Overridden by threshold rules in the alert decision module.

alert_reason.description: Short AI explanation of why this event warrants (or does not warrant) an alert.

event_at.description: Best-available event timestamp (ISO-8601 UTC), carried from the normalized item.

cluster_label.description: Short label for the event cluster this alert belongs to. Null if no cluster match.

examples.headline: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $120K
examples.summary_text: Bitcoin surged past $120,000, setting a new all-time high driven by strong institutional inflows and ETF demand.
examples.alert_reason: New all-time high is a high-importance milestone for the crypto audience.
